faqs.question: What career options are available after completing MBA from Bharatiya Engineering Science and Technology Innovation University?
faqs.answer:
MBA course is a two-year postgraduate level degree program focusing on Management, Business, and Entrepreneurial concepts. Students can check the list of career options available after completing MBA from Bharatiya Engineering Science and Technology Innovation University:
Job Profiles Description Average Salary (in INR)

faqs.question: Why should I pursue MBA from Bharatiya Engineering Science and Technology Innovation University?
faqs.answer:
The MBA eligibility requires candidates to have completed their graduation in any field  (Science, Commerce,  Arts) with an aggregate of 50% or more. Students can also check the list of reasons below to pursue MBA course from SBharatiya Engineering Science and Technology Innovation University:
Promising Career: The simplest approach to advance your career is to earn a Master of Business Administration. Students concentrate on the employment possibilities that follow earning a Master of Business Administration. MBA courses are becoming increasingly important to have managerial abilities and expertise as the globe becomes more and more competitive.
Develop Management Skills: Numerous Specialisations in Master of Business Administration enable students to concentrate on any specific area of business management. Each speciality aids students in developing a career in that particular industry. 
Entrepreneurship Abilities: Students learn about operating a business. For college students with a family company, this is particularly beneficial. The business will operate more efficiently and generate better returns thanks to the Master of Business Administration.

faqs.question: Is B.Tech available at Bharatiya Engineering Science and Technology Innovation University?
faqs.answer: Yes, BTech course is available at Bharatiya Engineering Science and Technology Innovation University. The university offers BTech courses at the UG level for four-years. Candidate must meet the eligibility criteria to enrol for BTech course admission set by the college. Aspirants must pass Class 12  to apply for the BTech course. BESTIU admission process is entrance-based.

college_info.intro:
Bharatiya Engineering Science and Technology Innovation University offers UG and PG courses across various streams such as Management, Engineering, Design, Law, Humanities, and other courses through 15 schools of study. The university offers the flagship courses of BTech, BSc, and MBA.
BESTIU offers a full-time, four-year BTech programme at the UG level. The BTech programmes offered at the university cover core courses in the areas of Bio Technology, Agricultural, CSE, Data Science, Cyber Security, and others. The BSc programme offered by the Bharatiya Engineering Science and Technology Innovation University is a three-year programme. It is offered in several specialisations, including Microbiology, Chemistry, Bio-Technology, and others.
Bharatiya Engineering Science and Technology Innovation University offers two-year MBA specialisations across various streams such as Agriculture Business Management, Fintech, Hospitality Management, Digital Marketing, and others. The university also offers an Executive MBA. Below-mentioned are BESTIU's popular programmes:

faqs.answer: A:    The fee bracket for programs offerred by the Bharatiya Engineering Science and Technology Innovation University is approximately INR 60000 - INR 500000.
faqs.question: What is the fee range for the courses offered at Bharatiya Engineering Science and Technology Innovation University?

faqs.answer: A:    Bharatiya Engineering Science and Technology Innovation University fee is a sum of multiple components such as tuition fee, caution deposit, exam fee, etc. Candidates need to pay the course fee to confirm their seat in the university. Below is the BESTIU fee for top courses:Course NameTotal Tuition FeeBTechINR 1.6 lakh-INR 3.5 lakhBDesINR 60,000MBAINR 80,000-INR 90,000BBAINR 75,000-INR 90,000MScINR 2 lakhNOTE: The above-mentioned fee is as per the official website/sanctioning body. It is subject to changes and hence, is indicative.
faqs.question: What is the fee for Bharatiya Engineering Science and Technology Innovation University?

faqs.answer: A:    The answer to this question depends on the course applied by the candidate. BESTIU conducts BEE for admission to courses such as BTech, MBA, MTech, etc. For some of the courses, selection is based on merit of the aspirants in the last qualifying exam. Hence, aspirants can apply for merit-based courses at BESTIU. Once selected, candidates need to pay the course fee to confirm their seat in the university.
faqs.question: Can I get admission to Bharatiya Engineering Science and Technology Innovation University without appearing in any entrance exam?

faqs.answer: A:    For admission to the MBA course at Bharatiya Engineering Science and Technology Innovation University, students need to fulfil the minimum eligibility criteria in the first place. The selection criteria for this course are BESTIU Admission TEST/CAT/GMAT/GRE + Interview. Apart from the selection criteria, aspirants must complete Graduate with a 50% aggregate (47% aggregate for NC - OBC, and 45% for SC/ST/DAP) and should have at least three years of work experience till the last date of application. Candidates who have not completed graduation are not eligible for admission.

reviews_list.review_title: In 2023, the college offered good placements when compared to the previous years.

review_content.Placements: 80 percent of the students were placed in this college. The highest package was 14 Lakhs, the lowest package is 5 lakhs, and the average package is 7 lakhs. The top recruiters are Wipro, Taaffe, Microsoft and Mahindra. The percentage of students who got internships is 75 percent, mostly in aerospace companies. The top role offered in this course in agriculture is field assistant.
review_content.Infrastructure: Faculty members and infrastructure was too good in this college and all the labs are highly equipped and highly satisfied with the labs in the college. All the blocks were also good in terms of infrastructure, and there is no worse thing about the college.

reviews_list.review_title: BESTIU is the key to unlocking the world and it is a passport to freedom.

admission_overview.title: Bharatiya Engineering Science and Technology Innovation University Admission Overview 2025
admission_overview.description: Bharatiya Engineering Science and Technology admissions are offered to UG & PG courses in the stream of Engineering and Technology. Students can pursue BTech, BCA, MTech and MCA courses across multiple specialisations. BEST Innovation University admissions are entirely entrance-based, followed by a screening by experts. The college has an in-house entrance exam for Engineering and Technological courses, i.e., BEE. Moreover, application forms are filled out in an online mode on the official website of Bharatiya Engineering Science and Technology.

eligibility_selection.title: Bharatiya Engineering Science and Technology Innovation University Eligibility & Selection 2025
eligibility_selection.description: BEST Innovation University admissions to UG & PG courses are based on an In-house entrance test, i.e., BEE. Along with that, candidates must also fulfil the minimum eligibility requirements for the respective courses. Check below the course-wise eligibility & selection criteria for BEST Innovation University courses 2025:

Candidates who have not completed graduation are not eligible for admission.

Check below the detailed steps for Bharatiya Engineering Science and Technology admission process for BTech and MBA courses:
Step 1: Application

The application process for Bharatiya Engineering Science and Technology is conducted in an online mode. Candidates can apply online on the college's official website and register for their desired courses. Along with that, they must submit the important documents and an application fee to finalise the application process.
Step 2: Selection Rounds

Bharatiya Engineering Science and Technology admission is entirely entrance-based for UG & PG courses. For the BTech, BCA, MCA and MTech course, candidates must qualify for the BESTIU Entrance Exam. Further, based on the application and entrance exam scores, candidates will be shortlisted and called for the screening. Candidates must carry hard copies of documents at the time of appearing for the interview.
Step 3: Final Admission

After the completion of all the rounds, candidates will be notified about their selection. The selected candidates must pay the registration fee along with theBharatiya Engineering Science and Technology fee. Further, they must also submit a photocopy of all the documents as proof at the time of admission.

reviews.review_heading: Good campus, supportive management, and a good, positive environment.
reviews.review_text: Good facilities and infrastructure, having labs, digital classrooms, and all course books are available in library. Speed Wi-Fi setup is established in our college. Food is also of good quality and hygienic, with a neat dining hall.

reviews.review_heading: In 2023, the college offered good placements when compared to the previous years.
reviews.review_text: Faculty members and infrastructure was too good in this college and all the labs are highly equipped and highly satisfied with the labs in the college. All the blocks were also good in terms of infrastructure, and there is no worse thing about the college.

reviews.review_heading: BESTIU is the key to unlocking the world and it is a passport to freedom.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are good I think the infrastructure was very nice; they provided Wi-Fi with a limited amount of data. The labs are excellent; they maintain cleanliness with all lab equipment. Classrooms are good with digital teaching boards. The canteen is quite good; they keep it clean and hygienic. There is also a medical room with a nurse on duty 24 hours a day, seven days a week.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied.
reviews.review_text: The facilities that are having in our college and infrastructure available for your course and department. The Wi-Fi has not there I mean not available in our college. Labs infrastructure not there, classrooms are some what good. Library is very small, the quality of the facilities in our hostel is food is unhygenic and taste less. In the mess and canteen also, medical facilities are not there, sports, and games etc.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college but it needs more development.
reviews.review_text: Our college provided good infrastructure but some more development is required. Hostel facilities were not good. The food quality was not good. Non-vegetarian food was not provided in the hostel. Laboratories were excellent.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The hotel had a good hostel. Wi-Fi was available in our college to browse new things from your gadgets. Our college had good lab facilities to do practical work. We had good and clean classrooms. Our college had a conference hall, a library, a digital library, and medical facilities.

reviews.review_heading: It's a great university for studies.
reviews.review_text: Our university moved from Anantapur ot its main campus, Gownivaripalli, Gorantal mandal, Sri Satya Sai Dist. Andhra Pradesh. Due this reason Our University is under development. Academic block 1 for computer science, block 2 is big compared to 1, for other courses.

reviews.review_heading: Studies and skills are the best.
reviews.review_text: All facilities like library, digital library, playgrounds, hostels, practice courts, swimming pool, canteen, medical facilities, digitalised classrooms, etc., are available in our college. The hostel food is good but only vegetarian food is supplied. Non-vegetarian food is not available. Infrastructure with hygienic lush green campus.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college for agriculture and engineering.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is quite well. The campus is not very spacious. The library and labs are well-equipped. The mess food is very good for all students. Sports and games facilities are available. Everyone can get their favourite sports material. The ground is not huge for cricket lovers.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college in Anantapur.
reviews.review_text: Every classroom has a digital infrastructure, and there are well-equipped labs. Our college has a good infrastructure. The quality of food served and rooms in the hostel are good and have facilities like medical and sports.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with faculty, but not with the placements and fees.
reviews.review_text: There is no Wi-Fi signal, and the signal is very poor. Labs are good enough. Classes are also good. Library facilities are good. The hostel facilities are good, but the food is not good.

reviews.review_heading: Our college does not provide placements.
reviews.review_text: Our campus is not Wi-Fi-enabled. There is a decent library in this college. Laboratoeies are decent. Classrooms are well-maintained. The food served in the mess is average. Medical facilities are available. Sports are conducted.

reviews.review_heading: It provides good placements at a low educational cost for building students' future.
reviews.review_text: In this college, laboratories are provided for many departments like agriculture, micro-biology, horticulture plant, and pathology. The classrooms are fine with digital projectors. Sports activities are provided. The mess is also available. The quality of food is better, and a commercial food court is also available.

reviews.review_heading: It's a good college with very good facilities, infrastructure and teachers.
reviews.review_text: The best infrastructure and facilities are available for B.Sc. honors. The library and Wi-Fi connections are good. Physics and chemistry labs are available. The classrooms are very neat and clean. The smart class facilities should be provided.

review_content.Placements: Many of them got placed. They provide internships in Tamilnadu and provide well-set hospitals. Among 6 month of internship, there are many facilities provided by the college. After internships, we can make a clinic set-up and treat the patients to gain more knowledge.

The college offers clinical training in specialised centers through partnerships with leading hospitals and governmental bodies. After graduating from SNS College of Physiotherapy, physiotherapists can get jobs in areas such as hospitals, rehabilitation centers, sports clinics, and fitness centers. The average salary package offered to the BPT students at SNS College of Physiotherapy is around INR 3.6 LPA.

Various facilities provided to the students include student clubs, gymnasiums, cricket and football grounds, indoor sports complex, a wellness centre with medical dispensary and ambulance, physical education resources, transportation, seminar halls, ATM services, smart AC classrooms, Wi-Fi connectivity, transportation facility and hostels.

answer.text: SNS College of Physiotherapy offers BPT course. To apply for the course, candidates must visit the official website and fill out the application form. The overall admission process and eligibility criteria are based on the enrollment rules defined by Dr. MGR Medical University. The minimum eligibility requirement involves passing Class 12 with Physics, Chemistry, Biology/Botany and Zoology as main subjects.

faqs.question: How can I apply for admission to SNS College of Physiotherapy in Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu?

answer.text: SNS College of Physiotherapy provides a total of 100 seats in the Bachelor of Physiotherapy (B.P.T) program. The admission is totally based on 65% merit qualification-based quota (MQ) and 35% general quota (GQ) so that all candidates may get equal opportunities for admission.

faqs.question: How many seats are available for the B.P.T programme at SNS College of Physiotherapy?

answer.text: The institute offers a four and half-year Bachelor of Physiotherapy course, including four years of academic study and a six-month internship period. SNS College of Physiotherapy offers the best clinical exposure through the internship, such as orthopedics, cardiology, neurology, etc.

faqs.question: What is the duration of the B.P.T programme at SNS College of Physiotherapy?

answer.text: For admission into the B.P.T course in SNS College of Physiotherapy, candidates have to submit documents like class 10 and 12 marksheets, passport-size photograph, Aadhar card, and caste certificate (if applicable). Along with that, if applicable, the Bachelor's degree marksheet and the online payment challan also need to be submitted with the application.

highlights.summary:
The JEE Main 2026 registration for session 2 has closed for Khyati College of Pharmacy admission to BTech, BArch and BPlan courses. The session 2 exams will be conducted from Apr 2 to Apr 9, 2026.

Here are some additional updates regarding the Khyati College of Pharmacy:

review_content.Placements: About 80% of students get placed according to their choices. The highest package is around 4–5 LPA, and the lowest is 2 LPA. I don’t have much knowledge about the company names. The desired roles are offered based on individual choices. For internships, students can apply and do them from anywhere they want.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is only for staff, not for students. Labs and classrooms only have fans. The college does not have its own hostel facility. The canteen area is small, and the canteen itself is also small. The garden area is not big, but library is present in the college for studying.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: It provides good facilities, and the fee structure is reasonable.

review_content.Placements: Placements are excellent in this college. College also makes the MoU for the different types of pharmacy companies like Zydus, Cadillac, and many more. The minimum salary package for the job employees is 2 LPA for the student qualifications.
review_content.Infrastructure: This college provides bus facilities and canteen facility. Laboratories are very good and the latest instruments are available for the students. Library is very big and provides the latest book for the particular course in the pharmacy. Classrooms are also good and air-conditioners and fans are available.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: I am very grateful to the college because of the good teaching staff and good placement.

review_content.Placements: Percentage of students were placed in my course was 70 Percentage. There are the highest package was the 3.1 Lacs per annum and the lowest one is 2.2 Lacs per annum. So many companies are recruiting the students first one is zyuds, Amnil, intas, baxter, medcart etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: There are well managed classroom and library available in our campus there are not available Wi-Fi facilities to the students. There only provide the hostel facilities to the grils not to the boys. In the mess the quality of food is average above. There are highly arranged games and medical free checkup for students.

The NEET MDS 2026 application process has commenced for Hitkarini Dental College and Hospital admission to the MDS course, with Mar 30, 2026, being the last date to register. Also, the NEET MDS exam 2026 is going to be held on May 2, 2026.

reviews_list.batch_info: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: The college has good and helpful teachers.

review_content.Placements: 100% of students got placed. The salary packages are very good. Good companies come here. Almost 100% of students got internships. Good opportunities are offered by this college. I would recommend joining this college. The college has helpful faculty.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college provides excellent facilities. Wi-Fi is available. The labs are very good. The food quality is excellent. Breakfast, lunch, evening snacks, and dinner are provided. There is a variety of food every day. The taste is very good. You can enjoy the food here. The college also has a mess.

reviews_list.batch_info: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: I am satisfied with the learning process, experienced faculty members and good infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: Hitkarini Dental College and Hospital doesn't provide placements. After BDS, you can work as a dental surgeon, and most of the students open private clinics or study further for MS in different departments. Some choose to work in hospitals under senior dentists to gain experience in the professional field.
review_content.Infrastructure: All the required facilities, including well-equipped practical labs, library, Wi-Fi, cafeteria, hostel accommodation and bus facilities for day scholars, are available. Hostel rooms are of two types, i.e., single and shared. Rooms have chairs, tables, beds and an almirah for each student. There is a separate mess for hostelers which provides vegetarian food.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: A very good college with quality education, which is absolutely value for money.

review_content.Placements: There aren't many students placed in our colleges. 10 percent of the overall students get placed every year. The highest package is of 7.5 LPA, and the lowest is 1 LPA. Top recruiting companies are edtech companies. The marketing sector and teaching are top roles.
review_content.Infrastructure: There is capable infrastructure available in our college, like AICTE Idea labs, done technology live, central library, computer-aided design lab, seminar halls in every department building, APJ Abdul Kalam Auditorium, Administrative block, and all the infrastructure needed for technical education, although no hostel facility is available.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2030
reviews_list.review_title: It is not luxurious, but it provides strong learning for serious MBBS students.

review_content.Placements: There is no placement system, as it is an MBBS course. After completion, we go for internships, postgraduate studies, or government/private hospital jobs. There are many departments where we can pursue PG and build our future. During internship, everyone is paid around Rs. 20,000 to Rs.22,000.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college infrastructure is decent for a government medical college. Lecture halls are good, with LH 4 being the biggest, used for first-year students. Labs are functional. The hospital has a good patient load, which helps us learn a lot and improves clinical learning. Hostel facilities are not very good but are manageable. We do not have an indoor badminton court, but there is outdoor space and a volleyball court.

review_summary.college_name: Tripura University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: It is an average college experience.

content.Placements: Placements in my college are average, and I would rate them 3 out of 5. Some companies visit every year, mostly mass recruiters. The average package is around 3 LPA. The placement cell is supportive, but students must prepare on their own for better results.
content.Infrastructure: The college infrastructure is decent but needs improvement in some areas. Classrooms are clean and spacious, but not very modern. The library is good, with enough books for study. Wi-Fi is available, but speed is slow and not reliable everywhere.

individual_reviews.course: M.Sc. in Mathematics - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Best faculty with quality education and friendly environment.

content.Placements: Since, my course is a master's in mathematics, it can be seen here that maximum students are inclined towards research more than the corporate sector. Even in the first semester itself, students are preparing for CSIR NET, and professors indeed meet our expectations. They intend to help us in whatever possible ways. This being said, direct placement is indeed not very good here. But the knowledge gained from here indeed is enough to get us into jobs like banking, teaching, and also some IT sector as our course provides us with deep knowledge into programming language.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: A very good college with quality education, which is absolutely value for money.

content.Placements: There aren't many students placed in our colleges. 10 percent of the overall students get placed every year. The highest package is of 7.5 LPA, and the lowest is 1 LPA. Top recruiting companies are edtech companies. The marketing sector and teaching are top roles.
content.Infrastructure: There is capable infrastructure available in our college, like AICTE Idea labs, done technology live, central library, computer-aided design lab, seminar halls in every department building, APJ Abdul Kalam Auditorium, Administrative block, and all the infrastructure needed for technical education, although no hostel facility is available.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2030
individual_reviews.title: It is not luxurious, but it provides strong learning for serious MBBS students.

content.Placements: There is no placement system, as it is an MBBS course. After completion, we go for internships, postgraduate studies, or government/private hospital jobs. There are many departments where we can pursue PG and build our future. During internship, everyone is paid around Rs. 20,000 to Rs.22,000.
content.Infrastructure: The college infrastructure is decent for a government medical college. Lecture halls are good, with LH 4 being the biggest, used for first-year students. Labs are functional. The hospital has a good patient load, which helps us learn a lot and improves clinical learning. Hostel facilities are not very good but are manageable. We do not have an indoor badminton court, but there is outdoor space and a volleyball court.

individual_reviews.course: M.Sc. in Forestry and Biodiversity - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: University environment is good, and the curriculum of my course is good and student oriented.

content.Placements: Placements only depend on government vacancies or other government internship projects. Ph.D. programs are available through qualifications from UGC NET, CSIR NET, etc. Most of the students choose to prepare for competitive exams rather than pursue Ph.D. courses. Placements are not that many.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are well-equipped with digital boards but the Wi-Fi facility is not so good. Drinking water facility is also available at the department for the students. Washrooms are well-maintained and clean. Some of the laboratory facilities are not available but the department is good.

The university offers a range of undergraduate, postgraduate, and doctoral courses in the stream of Business Management Studies, Accounting & Commerce, Law etc. Popular courses offered by the university areMBA, BEd, Mpharma, BBA etc.Read on to learn more aboutTripura University admissions 2025:

faqs.question: Which entrance exam is accepted by Tripura University?
faqs.answer: Tripura University course admissions will be based on various national-level entrance exam scores as per course requirements. Popular courses offered by the university areMBA, BEd, Mpharma, BBA etc.The below-mentioned table carries course-wise list of few entrance exam accepted for admissions:CoursesSelection CriteriaMBAMAT,  XAT,  CAT,  CMAT,  TUET,  CUET-PG followed by GD + PIBEdDistance Education Entrance TestMPharma*Entrance ExamBBAMerit-Based*Students having valid GPAT scores will be exempted from entrance & will be selected based on merit/rank/score of the GPAT

faqs.question: Can I join Tripura University directly?
faqs.answer: Candidates having a valid score in MAT/ XAT / CAT/ CMAT will get direct admission in MBA at Tripura University. Universities may also release a merit list based on marks obtained in graduation.It is a Central University that was established in October 1987. It is located at Agartala with 78 acres of campus. It is approved by UGC and has got accreditation from NAAC. It has achieved 88th rank in NIRF rankings and 4th rank in Eastern India in 2016. The University has 46 departments offering 58 programs to students from India and Bangladesh.

faqs.question: How do I get admission to Tripura University?
faqs.answer: Aspirants must take the CUET exam in order to get admitted to Tripura University's undergraduate programs. When registering for CUET online, give preference to Tripura University. Attend the test and try to get a good grade. Check the minimum scores required for programme at Tripura University after the CUET results are out. After this, students need to attend the counseling session if shortlisted.

faqs.question: What is the admission process of Tripura University?
faqs.answer: Tripura University Admission Process through CUET for few of courses. Students who are interested in taking admission at Tripura University can check the points mentioned below:Tripura University Application ProcessThe admission process starts with filling Tripura University application form. Interested candidates can visit the official website of Tripura University to apply for the course of their choice along with making the course fee payment.Tripura University Selection ProcessTripura University admission criteria are different as per the respective programme. Since the university also accepts many national-level-based entrance exam scores, aspirants need to apply for the same. Students can check here the application process such as CAT,  CUET,  NEET PG etc..Tripura University Admission ConfirmationAfter completion of the selection rounds, the shortlisted candidates are called for verification of the documents. Aspirants need to pay course fee to confirm their seat in the universit

description: Tripura University cutoff 2025 for CUET UG and CUET PG came to an end for admission to the various UG and PG courses. Candidates can scroll down to check the course-wise cutoff. A few more updates for Tripura University cutoff are given below:

Tripura University CUET PG cutoff 2024 concluded for students seeking admission to various postgraduate courses, like MA, MSc, MCom, MTech, and LLM. During the Tirupura University cutoff 2024, the cutoff scores range from 2 to 85, with M.Tech. in Chemical and Polymer Engineering being the most competitive course for the General AII India category students. The least competitive PG course was M.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering.

The CUET PG cutoff 2024 has been concluded for Tripura University. Till now, the University has released the first merit list for admission to various PG courses. Based on the Tripura University CUET PG cutoff 2024, the M.Tech. in Chemical and Polymer Engineering was the most competitive PG course with a cutoff score of 85. On the contrary, the least competitive course was M.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering with a cutoff score of 2 for the General AII Inda category students.

Tripura University accepts CUET PG scores, followed by a counselling process for admission to a list of PG courses. Candidates seeking admission to the Tripura University postgraduate courses can refer to the table below to check out some important dates related to CUET PG.

Tripura University has released the round-wise CUET PG merit list 2024 for admission to the PG courses. Candidates applying for admission to the Central University of Punjab postgraduate courses can refer to the table below to download the consolidated year-wise CUET PG counselling rounds.

Also, a dedicated Ambulance is stationed in the campus for an emergency. Common rooms with various recreational facilities are also available in both the hostels. library.description:
The Central Library has a collection of more than 97500 books and documents presently besides a rich collection of reports, state-of-arts, non-print media, etc. The Library subscribes to 141 journals both national and international in the area of subjects taught and e-journals under UGC INFONET programme. Approximately 8000 journals with millions of full-text articles in all subjects/disciplines are usable under
the UGC INFONET programme presently. The computerization of library services and the creation of database are under process by “SOUL” software and new advanced technology is under active consideration under INLIBNET.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by Tripura Institute of TechnologyReviewed on 20 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: It is an average college experience.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is decent but needs improvement in some areas. Classrooms are clean and spacious, but not very modern. The library is good, with enough books for study. Wi-Fi is available, but speed is slow and not reliable everywhere.

reviews.review_heading: Best faculty with quality education and friendly environment.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure available is the best. Smart classes are being used for better understanding of concepts. Wi-Fi is also available 24X7. Apart from that, the central library includes all types of books, magazines, and newspapers. It has a department library which contains materials exclusively for mathematics. Hostel facilities are better than any paid guest lodging. Here, food is of good quality and served three times a day, including snacks. Even though government hospital is far away from the u...

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by Tripura Institute of TechnologyReviewed on 3 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: A very good college with quality education, which is absolutely value for money.
reviews.review_text: There is capable infrastructure available in our college, like AICTE Idea labs, done technology live, central library, computer-aided design lab, seminar halls in every department building, APJ Abdul Kalam Auditorium, Administrative block, and all the infrastructure needed for technical education, although no hostel facility is available.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2030Offered by Agartala Government Medical CollegeReviewed on 2 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: It is not luxurious, but it provides strong learning for serious MBBS students.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is decent for a government medical college. Lecture halls are good, with LH 4 being the biggest, used for first-year students. Labs are functional. The hospital has a good patient load, which helps us learn a lot and improves clinical learning. Hostel facilities are not very good but are manageable. We do not have an indoor badminton court, but there is outdoor space and a volleyball court.

reviews.review_heading: University environment is good, and the curriculum of my course is good and student oriented.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are well-equipped with digital boards but the Wi-Fi facility is not so good. Drinking water facility is also available at the department for the students. Washrooms are well-maintained and clean. Some of the laboratory facilities are not available but the department is good.

reviews.review_heading: I am fully satisfied with this university and it's campus, classroom, and facilities.
reviews.review_text: With the course we get free Wi-Fi, football field, computer lab, and well-maintained campus and classrooms. Hotel facilities are good. Meal is healthy with proper drinking water. Basketball, football field, and volleyball courts are present, and students play regularly. An open gym is present for all students.

reviews.review_heading: Tripura University is a really awesome university in India.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is a good connection, and the labs' condition with the study room is simple but peaceful. The library is just wonderful because I have never experienced another library, but Tripura University library is still good, but sometimes the bookstore is too short, which is why not all students can borrow for their studies. I hope this problem is solved as soon as possible.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Tripura Institute of TechnologyReviewed on 19 Oct 2025)
reviews.review_heading: The affordable college life.
reviews.review_text: This college did not have its own hostel for some reasons, and if we talk about labs, it's good, can be usable, and Wi-Fi also provides a good network speed. The canteen is contractual, so it depends on the person who takes over for its items, and it's also cheap in pricing. For medical issues, there is a Maruti Omni also there as an ambulance, and a central library is available. There are lots of sports like football, volleyball, cricket, and tennis.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Tripura Institute of TechnologyReviewed on 18 Oct 2025)
reviews.review_heading: An average government college.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are good enough with a smartboard or monitor, projector, fans and proper sitting arrangements. Labs are well managed with AC fans and machines but the computers are not working or are old. Wi-Fi also has average speed or is not usable. Library also has enough books and good seating management for study

reviews.review_heading: Placement opportunities are great in this university.
reviews.review_text: All types of facilities are available in this university. Classrooms have smart boards, and libraries are properly equipped with more than 3,000 books. Our university arranges a sports day every year. Both indoor and outdoor sports facilities are available. Our university also has a club for mental health and well-being.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Swami Vivekananda MahavidyalayaReviewed on 29 Jul 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Disappointed with faculty and placement support.
reviews.review_text: Hostel facility is not available in the college. The water source available is unsuitable for drinking or any other use. The toilets are unusable, they are dirty, and smelly. Classrooms are dirty and not have enough materials to do practical and more.

reviews.review_heading: The best professors and guest lecturers are available in our department.
reviews.review_text: Hostels are available for distance students. The mess is available with proper food. Departments and hostels are within walking distance as it is inside the campus.

reviews.review_heading: The hostel buildings are clean and better than expected.
reviews.review_text: Hostel rooms are available with 24-hour water and 24-hour electricity facilities. Meals are provided in breakfast, lunch, and dinner. Various food options are available around the college. The canteen facilities are also there. Rooms are also available at cheap rates near the college campus. There is a large collection of books and journals in the university library.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Tripura University.
reviews.review_text: There are different courses offered for all three streams. There are also too many things to do other than just studying, like different societies are there in my college. Hostel facilities and mess food are very good. They provided it at a very reasonable hostel mess was a vegetarian one. The hostel rooms were very clean and hygienic and it was easy for every student to cope because there were not too many students in one room. The hostel room has a bed, chair, and table.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Techno College of Engineering, AgartalaReviewed on 27 May 2025)
reviews.review_heading: It is an AICTE-approved college.
reviews.review_text: There is just one building for the whole college, housing all branches of engineering along with Diploma and Bachelor of Technology (B.Tech) students. The courses are good and offer a variety, but the only issue is that there is no hostel.

highlights.summary:
The OJEE 2026 registration process has begun for Centurion University of Technology and Management, Bolangir Campus admission to BTech, BPharma, MBA, and MCA programmes. The final date to register is Mar 22, 2026. Additionally, the exam dates are tentatively scheduled for May 4 and May 5, 2026, and from May 7 to May 9, 2026.

A few more updates are given below:

college_info.intro: Centurion University of Technology and Management Bolangir offers a variety of popular programmes across various specialisations. CUTM Bolangir offers five UG, PG and Diploma courses through its two constituent schools. BSc and BPharma are among the popular courses of CUTM Bolangir. BSc is offered for 3 years in Forensic Pathology, Psychiatry, Psychology, Forensic Medicine and Odontology (Dentistry). BPharm is offered for a duration of 4 years. Admission to these courses is based on the in-house entrance exam, Centurion University Entrance Exam (CUEE).

fees_and_eligibility.overview: CUTM Bolangir offers various undergraduate and postgraduate courses through two schools. The CUTM School of Pharmacy and Life Sciences offers BPharm and DPharm, and the School of Applied Sciences offers BSc, MSc and BCA courses in different specialisations. These courses are offered in full-time mode. CUTM Bolangir admission to any of these courses is based on merit and entrance exam. The fees for the courses may vary depending on the type and level of the program.

reviews_list.review_title: Good college for graduation in Odisha.

review_content.Placements: All the students are placed in different companies with good packages and many students go for research work and do Ph.D. in scientific and technological field. Final year student from PG and Ph.D. are able to do internship programme to increase their experience.
review_content.Infrastructure: Labs are well-equipped with specimen and instrument and library is full of books to enhance your knowledge in any field. Food quality in hostels are okay and somewhat hygienic and acceptable to students. First aid facility is also their incase any emergency.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharm.) - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: It is a moderate pharmacy college.

review_content.Placements: I am from the batch of 2018, and it is the 1st pharmacy batch of Bolangir campus. We are offered both the degree and diploma for pharmacy. Now I am in 5th semester out of 8, but the diploma batch had already passed out in this year. All 30 students are offered placements in Apollo Pharmacy Kolkata in which some students went for further education.
review_content.Infrastructure: The course structure for the 1st year is Rs. 98,000, for 2nd, 3rd and 4th years, it is Rs. 83,000. The hostel charge is Rs. 50,000 per year, and the academic fee is average. According to the infrastructure of the institute, the course structure is slightly high. The hostel charge is high, according to the facilities offered. Food quality is very poor, especially for students from outwards. I recommend others to rent a room along with 3-5 students.

overview_faqs.question: Is it worth pursuing B.Sc at CUTM Bolangir?
overview_faqs.answer: BSc course at Centurion University of Technology and Management Bolangir can be worth considering. Individual choices may vary depending on the lifestyle, accomodation and career goals. The College assures placement facilities with 90% placement rate in 2023. The highest and median packages stood at INR 13.6 LPA and INR 4 LPA, respectively. Apart from these, the CUTM Bolangir has modern infrastructural facilities with well-equipped campus.

overview_faqs.question: Is CUTM Balangir a good college for B.Sc?
overview_faqs.answer: Yes, Centurion University of Technology and Management is a good college for BSc. CUTM Balangir BSc course is offered in various specialisations such as Forensic Pathology, Psychiatry, Psychology, Forensic Medicine and Odontology (Dentistry). For the BSc course, the the highest and median packages stood at INR 13.6 LPA and INR 4 LPA, respectively. CUTM offers UGC-recognized degrees. Admission to these courses is based on the Centurion University Entrance Exam (CUEE). However, considering a college as good may depend on individual preferences and choices.

review_summary.college_name: Centurion University of Technology and Management, Bolangir Campus Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: CUTM is a good college; it provides good facilities, but this campus wouldn't be a great choice.

content.Placements: As per the college's figures, approximately 90% of students get placed on campus, and the highest package is 9 lakh per annum, while the lowest is 2.4 LPA. However, the faculty are not that good at preparing students for interviews. Top recruiting companies include Reliance Industries, Mahindra Automobiles, and Empiro Technologies. Up to this date, there have been no internships provided by the placement department of the college.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is quite good, and the labs are average. However, the hostel infrastructure for boys is lacking; there are no proper accommodations for them. The classrooms are good, and a few even consist of digital boards for better understanding of the subjects.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Physics - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Review of Centurion University of Technology and Management, Bolangir Campus.

content.Placements: Almost 80% of students got placed in our course. The highest salary package offered ranges between 3 LPA - 9 LPA. Top recruiting companies are TCS, Tech Mahindra, Flipkart, Amazon, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Our college provides average facilities and infrastructure. Wi-Fi is available in our college. Its speed is low. The quality of the food in the mess is not hygienic and good. Sports and games are limited on campus.
content.Faculty: Teachers are good. They teach from textbooks. They help us. Our course curriculum doesn't make students industry-ready. The semester exams are easy to pass. We can pass by studying a day before exams.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Zoology - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Good college for graduation in Odisha.

content.Placements: All the students are placed in different companies with good packages and many students go for research work and do Ph.D. in scientific and technological field. Final year student from PG and Ph.D. are able to do internship programme to increase their experience.
content.Infrastructure: Labs are well-equipped with specimen and instrument and library is full of books to enhance your knowledge in any field. Food quality in hostels are okay and somewhat hygienic and acceptable to students. First aid facility is also their incase any emergency.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharm.) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: It is a moderate pharmacy college.

content.Placements: I am from the batch of 2018, and it is the 1st pharmacy batch of Bolangir campus. We are offered both the degree and diploma for pharmacy. Now I am in 5th semester out of 8, but the diploma batch had already passed out in this year. All 30 students are offered placements in Apollo Pharmacy Kolkata in which some students went for further education.
content.Infrastructure: The course structure for the 1st year is Rs. 98,000, for 2nd, 3rd and 4th years, it is Rs. 83,000. The hostel charge is Rs. 50,000 per year, and the academic fee is average. According to the infrastructure of the institute, the course structure is slightly high. The hostel charge is high, according to the facilities offered. Food quality is very poor, especially for students from outwards. I recommend others to rent a room along with 3-5 students.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Pharmacy (D.Pharma.) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Complete review of college, hostel, and many more details from D.Pharm 22-24 batch, Cutm Balangir.

content.Placements: I completed my D. Pharma in the 2022-24 batch. About 60% of students got placement in our batch, with packages ranging from a minimum of 1.5 lakhs per year to a maximum of 5 lakhs per year. Companies like Macleods, Mankind, Apollo, and Sun Pharma provide opportunities every year. After selection, students must work as interns, and their salaries vary according to company rules. Jobs such as hospital pharmacist, store pharmacist, inventory management, and others are available.
content.Infrastructure: The college has good classrooms with Wi-Fi, and all labs are equipped for study and practice. The library also contains books. The hostels are decent but not excellent; they provide basic amenities like study tables. The canteen food is quite good, similar to other hostels. Emergency vehicles are always available at both the college and hostel. Sports facilities like cricket, football, badminton, and a ground are provided.

courses_data.name: CUTM Bolangir BCA Admission 2025
courses_data.description: CUTM Bolangir offers a three-year BCA spread over six semesters at the UG level. The CUTM BCA is offered via the School of Applied Sciences, admission to both these courses is subject to a valid score in the CUEE exam conducted by the University. The below table mentions the minimum eligibility criteria required for admission to these courses: Course Eligibility Criteria BCA At least 50% aggregate in Class 12 in any relevant stream with English as a mandatory subject

faqs.question: What is the admission process for BCA at CUTM Bolangir?
faqs.answer: Admission to BCA at CUTM Bolangir is completely entrance-based. Tabulated below are the detailed selection parameters required for CUTM Bolangir BCA admissions:CourseEligibilitySelectionBCAClass 12 or equivalent in any stream with a minimum 45% marksCUEE

faqs.question: What is the fee for BCA at CUTM Bolangir?
faqs.answer: CUTM Bolangir offers BCA programme in a full-time mode. Candidates need to pay a course fee of INR 1.5 Lacs for all the three years of the programme. A certain part of the fee is paid at the time of admission before the seat confirmation.

courses_data.name: CUTM Bolangir BSc Admission 2025
courses_data.description: The CUTM Bolangir campus also offers a three-year BSc programme in six specialisations. CUTM Bolangir BSc admission is subject to getting a valid score in CUEE conducted by the University. Candidates must also fulfill the minimum eligibility criteria as mentioned below to get considered for admission: BSc Course Eligibility Criteria Applied Physics A pass in Class 12 from a recognised board with Physics, Chemistry, and Mathematics/Biology as main subjects along with a minimum of 50% aggregate Applied Chemistry Applied Mathematics Botany Zoology

faqs.question: Is there any entrance exam for B.Sc at CUTM Bolangir?
faqs.answer: Yes, CUTM Bolangir conducts entrance exam for BSc programme. Aspirants need to pass Class 12 from a recognies board. Moreover, the final admission is done based on CUEE exam scores.

faqs.question: Does CUTM Bolangir offer B.Sc course?
faqs.answer: Yes, Centurion University of Technology and Management, Bolangir Campus offers a three-year BSc course in a full-time mode. The course is offered in only single specialisation, i.e., Forensic Science. Candidates can apply for the programme on the official website of CUTM.

courses_data.name: CUTM Bolangir BSc Admission 2025
courses_data.description: The CUTM Bolangir campus also offers a three-year BSc programme in six specialisations. CUTM Bolangir BSc admission is subject to getting a valid score in CUEE conducted by the University. Candidates must also fulfill the minimum eligibility criteria as mentioned below to get considered for admission: BSc Course Eligibility Criteria Applied Physics A pass in Class 12 from a recognised board with Physics, Chemistry, and Mathematics/Biology as main subjects along with a minimum of 50% aggregate Applied Chemistry Applied Mathematics Botany Zoology

faqs.question: Is there any entrance exam for B.Sc at CUTM Bolangir?
faqs.answer: Yes, CUTM Bolangir conducts entrance exam for BSc programme. Aspirants need to pass Class 12 from a recognies board. Moreover, the final admission is done based on CUEE exam scores.

faqs.question: Does CUTM Bolangir offer B.Sc course?
faqs.answer: Yes, Centurion University of Technology and Management, Bolangir Campus offers a three-year BSc course in a full-time mode. The course is offered in only single specialisation, i.e., Forensic Science. Candidates can apply for the programme on the official website of CUTM.

faqs.question: How can I get admission to CUTM?
faqs.answer: Admission to CUTM is strictly entrance-based. The university accepts Centurion University Entrance Examination (CUEE). Refer to the steps mentioned below for the complete CUTM Admission Process:Step 1: CUTM Application Process 2025The CUTM application process is conducted online on the official website of the university. The candidates must start their application process by registering themselves using a valid email ID and phone number.Step 2:Selection ProcessThe CUTM shortlists candidates based on their performance in the entrance exam. CUEE is an online, remote- Proctored test consisting of English, Physics, Chemistry and Mathematics/ Zoology & Botany sections.Step 3: Final AdmissionSelected candidates are required to pay the admission fees to confirm their seats. The admission fees will be, later, deducted from the first-semester tuition fee.

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission for various courses at CUTM Bolangir?
faqs.answer: No, direct admission is not valid for any courses at CUTM Bolangir. Candidates are admitted based on CUEE scores only. Students need to meet the basic eligibility criteria and qualify for the college level CUEE exam with a valid score.

faqs.question: Are admissions open at CUTM Balangir?
faqs.answer: Yes, admissions are currently open at Centurion University of Technology and Management, Balangir for the current academic year. Candidates can apply for either UG or PG courses on the online application portal of the college.

faqs.question: How can I get admission to B.Pharma at CUTM Bolangir?
faqs.answer: To get admission to the CUTM Balangir BPharma course, candidates must fulfil the minimum eligibility and apply on the official website. For the BPharma course, admission is based on in-house entrance exam, Centurion University Entrance Exam (CUEE). BPharma course is offered through the School of Pharmacy and Life Sciences, Bolangir. To apply online, candidates can follow the given steps below:Register for the Centurion University Entrance Examination (CUEE).Appear for the CUEE and score a high rank as entrance exams are competitive.Pay the admission fees to confirm your seat.Upload your documents and personal details.Submit your application form.

reviews.review_heading: CUTM is a good college; it provides good facilities, but this campus wouldn't be a great choice.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is quite good, and the labs are average. However, the hostel infrastructure for boys is lacking; there are no proper accommodations for them. The classrooms are good, and a few even consist of digital boards for better understanding of the subjects.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Centurion University of Technology and Management, Bolangir Campus.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides average facilities and infrastructure. Wi-Fi is available in our college. Its speed is low. The quality of the food in the mess is not hygienic and good. Sports and games are limited on campus.

reviews.review_heading: Good college for graduation in Odisha.
reviews.review_text: Labs are well-equipped with specimen and instrument and library is full of books to enhance your knowledge in any field. Food quality in hostels are okay and somewhat hygienic and acceptable to students. First aid facility is also their incase any emergency.

reviews.review_heading: It is a moderate pharmacy college.
reviews.review_text: The course structure for the 1st year is Rs. 98,000, for 2nd, 3rd and 4th years, it is Rs. 83,000. The hostel charge is Rs. 50,000 per year, and the academic fee is average. According to the infrastructure of the institute, the course structure is slightly high. The hostel charge is high, according to the facilities offered. Food quality is very poor, especially for students from outwards. I recommend others to rent a room along with 3-5 students.

reviews.review_heading: Complete review of college, hostel, and many more details from D.Pharm 22-24 batch, Cutm Balangir.
reviews.review_text: The college has good classrooms with Wi-Fi, and all labs are equipped for study and practice. The library also contains books. The hostels are decent but not excellent; they provide basic amenities like study tables. The canteen food is quite good, similar to other hostels. Emergency vehicles are always available at both the college and hostel. Sports facilities like cricket, football, badminton, and a ground are provided.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is very good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. The hostel is very good and hygienic. Our college provides us with all facilities. Wi-Fi facility is available in the hostel. The electricity facility is available 24X7.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Kala Ashram Ayurved Medical College and Hospital is an institute which offers various courses at UG level. Students can choose Full Time programmes from stream such as Medicine & Health Sciences. At the UG level, students can choose the available programmes such as B.A.M.S.

reviews_list.review_title: I am satisfied with this college.

review_content.Placements: Our college does not provide good placements. They provide internship of 1 year, which is 6 months of Ayurveda and 6 months of allopathy. After 5.5 years, you will receive B.A.M.S. degree.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college is well equipped with all types of labs, including an anatomy lab, physiology lab, pathology lab, etc. Our college provides excellent infrastructure. The campus surroundings are good.
review_content.Faculty: Our teachers are well-qualified and helpful. They help us in every situation. Every subject has the best teacher possible with very good experience. Exams are conducted yearly, and after the completion of one year, we have annual exams.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Ayurvedic Medicine and Surgery (BAMS) - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: It's a humble college, but it has potential.

review_content.Placements: More than 80% of students are placed, but many of them also pursue PG. The minimum salary package offered is 4 LPA to 5 LPA. Top roles offered are doctors, health officers, etc. You can do a private job or a government job. It has great potential in the government sector. Many students are pursuing PG to get high-paying jobs.
review_content.Infrastructure: It's a fairly new college, so the campus is not huge. The quality of facilities is good. It has labs and every facility a medical college needs. It has sports programs. It has a volleyball court.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Ayurvedic Medicine and Surgery (BAMS) - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: KAAMCH review of BAMS Course

review_content.Placements: There are 60 students in a batch of BAMS course. A normal Ayurvedic doctor can earn from 15k to 2 lakhs per month depending upon one's experience and knowledge. One can go in Clinical, Research, teaching , or companies like Patanjali, Dabur, Ayu, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: We have all the facilities, a BAMS student needed like proper labs of Anatomy and Physiology mainly , library ,etc. Mess food is good and nutritious like homely food. Facilities of Sports and games are also good like Volleyball court , etc. True sport spirit can be seen.

reviews.review_heading: University is good. Teachers and infrastructure are also good.
reviews.review_text: Our college facilities are good. It is clean and hygienic. Wi-Fi is also good, sometimes there will be a problem with it. Labs and classrooms are clean and hygienic. Library is not available. The department of the college is also good. Hostel facilities are not available our college.

reviews.review_heading: No other colleges provide internships with stipends, but we have all types of facilities.
reviews.review_text: I gave 4 stars for facilities and infrastructure because in our college we have the opportunity to use free Wi-Fi, but only related to education. Moreover, they provided tabs for each individual to attend quizzes for each and every topic. Technically, they are more forward, and we learn all with digital systems. The classrooms are good and spacious. The only reason for the low rating is that we have MLT and AOTT in one lab itself. It would have been in a different room, but it's not meshed and s...

reviews.review_heading: College is good. We can learn more new things, & the college is providing placements and internships
reviews.review_text: I am aware that they are providing a good Wi-Fi connection, and our classrooms are good and hygienic. Our labs are very helpful to students to remember the concepts better and to transfer the experience to real-life situations. It is a facility that provides controlled conditions in which scientific research takes place. We don't have a library, and I wish they would provide us with one.

reviews.review_heading: We have good facilities and clean and hygienic college.
reviews.review_text:
We have a good, clean, and hygienic lab.
We can practice well here before going to the internship. 
Classrooms are very good with hygiene and with AC.
We don't have hostel canteens here.
We have medical facilities like first aid medicine. 
When they hold any function, we will play many games and sports.

reviews.review_heading: Till now, our college journey is going well.
reviews.review_text: Facilities in our college are good. We have a well-equipped laboratory and classroom with smart TV board. We have quizzes after every class for our better understanding. The library is not yet set up in our centre. We have good facilities. We have proper classes, and we can understand.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied in classes but dissatisfied with the teachers regrading the students .
reviews.review_text: The labs and classrooms are equipped with WiFi. However, we do not have a library, hostel canteens, or games & sports facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the education, the faculty, and good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The classrooms are quite nice and a little different from what I've seen elsewhere. The course that I'm doing is very interesting, and we get to learn a lot from it. The labs are nice, and our college offers VR experiences, which is new and something I haven't heard of and I think could really help with what we can expect in the actual setup.

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good. The college offers high-quality Wi-Fi but sometimes there is a technical issue with the Wi-Fi. The classroom is good but we don't have a library.

reviews.review_heading: Emversity is a best college for the students who wants to grow in as healthcare professionals.
reviews.review_text: Emversity has smart boards in its classrooms and labs that help students in smart learning. However, there is no canteen or playground on the campus.

reviews.review_heading: If the campus is big, everyone will join this college.
reviews.review_text: The college does not have a hostel facility but they help us in finding suitable accommodation (PG). The college should open a hostel so that students with poor financial backgrounds can afford it.

reviews.review_heading: Good faculty and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The college offers advanced labs. After every video of the class, there is a quiz to assess our performance. We are provided with every facility that we need.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied because of faculty, smart technology, good placements, and internships.
reviews.review_text: We have A.C. in our class; we have chairs, and we are provided with tabs where we can see the explanation, which is recorded so that it helps in examinations. We also have Wi-Fi in our college, so it will not be a problem during quizzes; we have quizzes after every section.

reviews.review_heading: The college journey till now is going well.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are better. Classrooms are simple and good. For Wi-Fi facilities, sometimes we face technical issues. The infrastructure looks like an office, okay, adjustable, and the lab setup gives a real OT environment experience; actually, right now we don't have any kind of hostel facility.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure, facilities, and placements in top hospitals.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure that are available for us for our course are designed and developed well with all the basic to advanced requirements that are needed for us to learn for our course. A nice and clean environment is also maintained day to day. Good to be here.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with the campus, teachers and course.
reviews.review_text: I am very happy to have an educator like this; they teach us very well and value each and every student. The classrooms are neat and clean always, with good VR labs in which we can practice treating the patients and do not panic at that moment.

review_content.Placements: Being a doctor is considered to be of very high esteem in our country. There isn't any placement or such in medical colleges, but rest assured when we pass out with a medical degree from such a reputable college there will be no shortage of jobs. One dentist can easily earn up to Rs. 50,000 per month according to their ability.
review_content.Infrastructure: HIDS has its own dedicated library with a vast collection of medical books. All reference books, medical journals, guidebooks, and much more are available for students starting from 1st year to MS. All the non-clinical subjects have their own assigned laboratories with enough infrastructure. Clinics contain all the modern equipment required for a dental hospital. All lecture halls are air-conditioned with modern projectors and under constant CCTV surveillance. Boys' and girls hostels are different, with 3 different canteens, 1 general shop, and one unisex parlor inside the campus. Maximum requirements of students are fulfilled inside the campus itself. Different playgrounds for football, basketball, volleyball, and tennis are available for the athletes. The food in mess is okay.

reviews_list.batch_info: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely satisfied with the faculty, nice curriculum and good infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: As BDS is all about getting a medical degree, you can start earning once you complete your internship and gain proper knowledge. It's a professional course, so you can earn as much as you can and can also apply for jobs in hospitals or else work as a junior doctor under a senior doctor. College does not provide any placement.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is moderate, but faculty members present here are excellent. The college also has hostel facilities, and I would say they are manageable, not so lavish, but as a student, you can manage it. There are 2 mess and 5 canteens inside the campus, and the food is average.

reviews_list.batch_info: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: Himachal Institute of Dental Sciences is a dentistry hub.

review_content.Placements: Placements depend on how you have been training yourself though many students clear the PG exams and are capable of opening clinics after UG as well as PG. But imterns and residents here do not get any stipend this is the drawback. The campus is huge.
review_content.Infrastructure: The hostel is good with the availability of 2 and 3 seater rooms in our college. They have wall fans in the classes. The lecture theatres have air-conditioners. There is the staired design of seat for focus on every student. The library is well furnished and it is the most desired place of students. It has all the books.

description: Himachal Institute of Dental Sciences cutoff 2025 is available on this page for various accepting exams. Candidates can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the cutoff details across different rounds and categories. Other important updates are as follows:

Himachal Institute of Dental Sciences NEET UG cutoff 2024 has been announced for admission to the BDS course. The institute offers admission to the BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery course based on candidates’ performance in the NEET UG exam. Eligible candidates are then called for the counselling rounds for final admission. During the Himachal Institute of Dental Sciences 2024 cut off, the last round closing rank for BDS admission was 3225. For more information, refer to the table below:
As per the Himachal Institute of Dental Sciences BDS cutoff 2024, the last round closing rank was 3225 for the General AI category students.

Among the OBC category students, the last-round cutoff rank stood at 3393 for admission to BDS in the AI quota. For the students belonging to the SC category, the cutoff closed at 3376 in the final round. To learn more about the courses, rounds, and category-wise NEET UG cutoff trends, use the filters provided below:

Himachal Institute of Dental Sciences accepts NEET UG scores for admission to the BDS course. Candidates can refer to the table below to check out the important NEET UG dates for admission to Himachal Institute of Dental Sciences.

Himachal Institute of Dental Sciences NEET UG Counselling 2024 has been concluded for admission to the Medical courses for various categories such as General, OBC, SC, and ST. Candidates seeking admission to Himachal Institute of Dental Sciences can refer to the table below to view or download the consolidated year-wise NEET UG counselling rounds.

In the table below, candidates can view the last three years' cutoff details of the courses offered via NEET UG. In the last round, Himachal Institute of Dental Sciences BDS cutoff 2025 was 2638 for the General Home State category.

In 2024, the last round cutoff rank for the same course stood at 809715. So, considering the last two years' cutoff data, it is evident that the HP NEET UG cutoff has increasing for BDS admission over the past three years.

Himachal Institute of Dental Sciences Cutoff 2024 has been released for its first round based on candidates' performance in the HP NEET PG exam. The Round 1 cutoff for admission to the MDS in Conservative Dentistry was 73 for the General AI quota.

Candidates can find the Round 1 Cutoff for this year along with the last-round cutoff for the previous 2 years to have an overall idea of the Cutoff trends. However, more details such as round and category-wise cutoff can be viewed using the filter pro

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Chemistry - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: No placement, but good teaching; knowledgeable teachers are great for sports. Take admission.

content.Placements: 50 to 100 students got placed. The college does not provide placements but offers valuable knowledge and a vibrant college life. Some department staff and students currently hold high positions, and they encourage internships. Additionally, some meetings are arranged by the college for students to get on-campus job offers.
content.Infrastructure: The college has good infrastructure and environment. The hostel is also good, and they provide Wi-Fi. Classrooms are neat, and the labs are excellent with proper maintenance. The lab in charge is responsible, supportive, and friendly. The college offers many courses, making it a good institution.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Computer Science - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: The Best College of Vellore.

content.Placements: In our course, more than 70 percent of students got the placement. The highest salary is 7 LPA, the average salary is 5 LPA, and the lowest salary is 2.9 LPA. The top recruiting companies are TCS, Wipro, Zoho, Infosys, HCL, etc. There is no intern in our college. The roles offered in our course were Software Engineer, Tester, Scholar Trainee, etc.
content.Infrastructure: In our course/our department, there are multiple labs for students based on their standards, like UG and PG. In our department, there is an air-conditioned lab with Wi-Fi facility and a good system for practicals. The quality of the hostel is good, the food in our hostel is good to eat and hygienic. In our college, there is a sports day conducted every year with lots of games.
